name: jun
role: backend

Working toward the code freeze on Friday the 27th. That's the date I have, so I'm
front-loading: the API changes land Wednesday, Thursday is buffer for review and
QA, and I'm done before the 27th. Anything risky I'm cutting now rather than
pushing it against the freeze.

Telling my reviewers to expect my PRs early this week so nothing's stuck in
review when the freeze hits.
